violations.text: The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (in a plastic bag) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location that allows proper drainage. Ice scoop was placed on top of bag during time of inspection and ice scoop holder was ordered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Handwashing sinks throughout the establishment are lacking the proper signage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Parfaits were removed from self-service sale at time of inspection. Packaged foods must be properly labeled when placed out for self service sale. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The door to the outside, located in the cafe preparation area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The cutting board on prep unit in the cafe area is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

The drain plugs for the outside refuse units are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
